# UC-22.40.6 · Cross-cutting — TACACS+ Privileged Command Audit Coverage Across Networks

> **Criticality:** High &middot; **Difficulty:** Intermediate &middot; **Pillar:** Security &middot; **Type:** Compliance

*We aggregate TACACS+ privileged command coverage across all networks for cross-cutting compliance evidence. That is important for the audit, where proof needs to line up with what the rules expect.*

---

## Description

We aggregate TACACS+ privileged command coverage across all networks for cross-cutting compliance evidence.

## Value

Multiple frameworks (NIST 800-53, ISO 27001, PCI DSS) require privileged-command logging. This UC produces a single coverage measurement that satisfies all of them.

## Implementation

Schedule the saved search daily at 06:00 local time; archive results to the `audit_evidence` summary index for the cross-cutting MFA-control evidence pack.

## Evidence

Saved search archived to `audit_evidence`.

## Control test

### Positive scenario

Privileged commands occur. Evidence aggregated.

### Negative scenario

No privileged activity. Empty result.

## Detailed Implementation

## Prerequisites

- UC-17.1.43 operational.

## Step 1-5

```ini
[UC-22.40.6: Privileged Command Coverage]
cron_schedule = 0 7 * * *
actions = summary_index
action.summary_index._name = audit_evidence
action.summary_index.marker = uc=22.40.6,family=privileged_access
```

## SPL

```spl
index=nac sourcetype="cisco:ise:syslog" MessageCode IN (11042, 11043) earliest=-1d
| stats count, dc(user) as users, dc(device_ip) as devices by command_authz_result
| eval evidence_status="privileged_command_coverage"
| collect index=audit_evidence
```

## Visualization

Cross-framework privileged-access dashboard.

## Known False Positives

1. Approved planned changes — annotate with ticket reference.
